name: Pro Performance Golf Academy
address: 3020 Niles Cortland Rd NE, Cortland, OH 44410
about: Pro Performance Golf Academy is the instruction and golf simulator branch of Tamer Win Golf & C.C., offering a comprehensive environment for golf improvement. The facility provides year-round access to professional coaching through private, group, and junior lessons, conducted on both a natural grass driving range and indoors using state-of-the-art TrackMan simulators and a PuttView interactive green. It combines elite technology with practical on-course skill development for golfers of all levels. The academy integrates club fitting services, utilizing TrackMan radar technology and PING demo equipment, with professional instruction to ensure equipment and technique are optimized for each player's unique needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional TrackMan technology for precise swing analysis
Year-round instruction on natural grass and advanced simulators
Free PING demo equipment provided for all lessons
Comprehensive club fitting with data-driven recommendations

food_and_drink.notes: No information about on-site food services available
No information about alcohol services available

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art TrackMan golf simulators mentioned but no specific model detailed

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, PING demo equipment is available for all lessons free of charge.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drinks to the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time estimate for 18 holes is provided, but the facility offers TrackMan simulators which typically allow for faster rounds than on-course play.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy offers junior golf clinics and lessons, making it suitable for young golfers.
